title: Free Fallin'
meaning_summary: Its melody, broad familiarity, and easy replayability make it one of the clearest long-tail earners in the Tom Petty catalog.
revenue_drivers: Classic-rock and evergreen playlists support strong repeat listening.
High recognition keeps the song active in rediscovery and sync use.
Writer-side participation improves retained catalog value.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Free Fallin' is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
